arts.ttl: 'I would love to see Marcus Rashford at Arsenal' claims former Gunners star
arts.sum: Arsenal could make a ‘real statement of ambition’ and would ‘destroy the opposition’ if they signed Marcus Rashford, according to one of their former stars. 'I would love to see Marcus Rashford at Arsenal' claims former Gunners star

arts.ttl: Man United injury news: Red Devils defender limps off in first half against Tottenham in EFL Cup
arts.sum: Manchester United defender Victor Lindelof is forced off injured during the first half of Thursday's EFL Cup quarter-final with Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Manchester United suffer another injury blow as player storms down tunnel vs Tottenham
arts.sum: Manchester United were forced into a first-half change during the quarter-final against Tottenham Hotspur in the Carabao Cup with Victor Lindelof going off

arts.ttl: Man Utd fans make feelings clear with Marcus Rashford banner in away end at Tottenham
arts.sum: Manchester United fans have produced a banner urging Marcus Rashford to move on after the forward, who has been overlooked for selection, hinted he was looking to leave the club

arts.ttl: Why Tottenham fans released yellow balloons during Man Utd clash
arts.sum: Tottenham supporters released yellow balloons during the seventh minute of their match against Manchester United in support of Spurs fan Emily Damari who is being held in Gaza

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher argues Marcus Rashford has left Man United in 'a really poor position' after bombshell interview as Liverpool legend claims 'it's time to move on'
arts.sum: The £375,000-a-week star announced on Monday that he is ready for a 'new challenge' away from Man United after two decades at the club, a day after being left out of his side's squad against Man City.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford labelled "flop of 2024" as struggles continue after Man Utd statement
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has had a year to forget after failing to deliver once more with the Manchester United forward regularly coping criticism as he opens the door to a move away

arts.ttl: Tottenham plotting January move for former Antonio Conte favourite amid defensive nightmares?
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly a possible destination for Paris Saint-Germain defender Milan Skriniar, who has fallen out of favour in the French capital.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville insists it's 'best for both parties' if Marcus Rashford leaves Man United after the forward's bombshell admission he's ready to exit Old Trafford
arts.sum: The United striker, who made his first-team debut in 2016, also claimed that it was a matter of 'when' not 'if' regarding his departure when speaking to journalist Henry Winter.

arts.ttl: Man Utd 'make formal offer' to beat Arsenal to Rashford replacement
arts.sum: In spite of the concerns, United feel that finding a top replacement for Rashford is imperative to the operation and Catalan outlet El Nacional report that Nico Williams is considered the ‘perfect profile’ by the club. Although the report claims that United have already submitted a formal offer for Williams, the Premier League giants would be unlikely to push for a move unless an exit route for Rashford is found.
